subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down the verses, subdued all utterance, and made to speak all who dwell in earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و سخر البیانات و انطق من فی الارضین و السموات
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
